systemName: Wing⚡Boss Phase 6 Staff Academy Audit Report
whatWasDone: Expanded Staff Academy lessons into short service-ready modules.
Added SOP checklists for cooking, sauce/dry-rub execution, packaging, clarification, and shift training.
Added customer clarification scripts with Khmer placeholders.
Added order-reading examples for common staff mistakes.
Added quiz bank generated from lesson quick-check questions.
Added training matrix by staff role.
Added Phase 6 integration notes for frontend and backend use.
pricingPolicy: No new prices invented. Lessons avoid quoting prices except PRICE_REQUIRED_FROM_MENU behavior.
heatSystemPolicy: Heat Points must only be awarded after paid + completed + not refunded status.
knownOpenItems: Khmer translations are placeholders and require human review.
Staff user IDs and role mapping still need final setup in bot backend.
Live training completion tracking requires Phase 7 or later implementation.
No production Telegram test was run in this phase.
verification: JSON files generated and parsed successfully.
